steps.name: Mustard Seed
steps.provenance_note: Captured from the live Claude Design canvas via OmeletteService/GetFile on 2026-06-03 (cut Theo's export out of the loop). Source-of-truth = canvas v9 file sha a4796a9e0fa09d7e722aa783d17ef64a44eb8910d5a15a11cc4e70a55b76a101 (27,549 b; hashes matched the corrected, hash-validated receipt twice). Baked BrainA panel asset assets/brain-panel-baked-600x873.png sha fa6d84534857babb10d4e173bbb60d083c35f44d386bce3f566f738d4c3b0cf0 (614,679 b) + all 7 Klaviyo-CDN images verified byte-for-byte against the canvas, inlined via flatten_claude_export.py (all fidelity gates passed; zero runtime residue, every a data: URI, VML/MSO preserved). v9 uses ZERO background-image: the blue brain panel is a single linked (403-char alt) with the cream arch baked in, so the static render shows the arch structurally — confirmed in the flattened render. This resolves the v8 design gap (v8 overlaid live text on a 600x873 brain background that lacked the prominent arch and overflowed its height, flattening the bottom). Receipt task_id mustard-seed-uqdtqi-braina-top-white-v9-design-review-2026-06-03, receipt hash-validated = true. v8 kept in place for history.
